relationships: tok:mi jan ni﹕ mi pilin e ike taso tan tenpo kama
tok:sina pilin e ni﹕ jan ike mi li lon. taso ona li lon ala kin
tok:sina ale li sama jan utala taso lon musi pi mije lawa ma
